sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (id UInt32, time DateTime, number UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

SELECT sequenceMatch('(?1)(?2)(?t>60)')(time, number = (SELECT number FROM events WHERE number > 2 OR number < 1), number = 2) FROM events GROUP BY number HAVING sequenceMatch('(?1)(?2)(?t>60)')(time, number = 1, number = (SELECT number FROM events WHERE time < '2023-10-01 00:10:00'));
SELECT sequenceMatch('(?1)(?t>30)(?2)')(time, number = 1 OR number = 3, number = 2) FROM events WHERE time >= '2023-10-01 00:00:00' AND time < '2023-10-01 00:15:00';
CREATE TABLE temp_events AS SELECT * FROM events WHERE number IS NULL;
INSERT INTO temp_events VALUES (6, NULL, 1), (7, '2023-10-01 00:20:00', NULL);
SELECT sequenceMatch('(?1)(?t<300)(?2)')(time, number = (SELECT MAX(number) FROM events), number = (SELECT MIN(number) FROM temp_events)) FROM events;

SELECT sequenceMatch('(?1)(?t<120)(?2)(?3)')(time, number = (SELECT number FROM events WHERE time < '2023-10-01 00:01:00' OR time > '2023-10-01 00:10:00'), number = 2, number = (SELECT number FROM temp_events WHERE time IS NULL)) FROM events HAVING number > 0;
ALTER TABLE events ADD COLUMN description String;

SELECT sequenceMatch('(?1)(?t>300)(?2)')(time, number = (SELECT number FROM events WHERE description IS NOT NULL), number = (SELECT number FROM events WHERE number = 2 OR number IS NULL)) FROM events GROUP BY time ORDER BY time DESC;
